requirements.title: Form Authentication
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to authenticate via a login form.

requirements.title: File Upload
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to upload files to the server.

requirements.title: File Download
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to download files from the server.

requirements.title: Home Page Examples List
requirements.description: The system shall display a list of links to all available example pages.

requirements.title: Footer Attribution
requirements.description: The system shall provide a consistent footer section attributing the site to Elemental Selenium on example pages.

requirements.title: Checkbox State Toggle
requirements.description: The system shall allow the user to toggle checkbox states.

requirements.title: Successful Login
requirements.description: The system shall grant access to a secure area when valid credentials are provided.

requirements.title: User Authentication
requirements.description: The system shall authenticate the user when provided with valid credentials.

requirements.title: Error Handling for Invalid Credentials
requirements.description: The system shall display an error message when login information is incorrect.

requirements.title: Dropdown Selection
requirements.description: The system shall allow the user to change the selection within a dropdown list.

requirements.title: Basic Alert Trigger
requirements.description: The system shall trigger a JavaScript alert dialog upon user interaction.

requirements.title: Confirm and Prompt Triggers
requirements.description: The system shall trigger JavaScript confirm and prompt dialogs upon user interaction.

requirements.title: Drag and Drop Example Rendering
requirements.description: The system shall render a region that supports drag-and-drop functionality.

requirements.title: Data Tables Rendering
requirements.description: The system shall display data tables containing specific user information columns.

requirements.title: Row Actions Representation
requirements.description: The system shall provide edit and delete action controls within each table row.

requirements.title: Notification Message Rendering
requirements.description: The system shall display a notification message above the page heading.

requirements.title: Load New Notification Message
requirements.description: The system shall allow the user to trigger the loading of a new notification message.

requirements.title: Entry Ad Display on First Load
requirements.description: The system shall automatically display an advertisement modal upon initial page load.

requirements.title: Close Ad and Prevent Reappearance
requirements.description: The system shall allow the user to close the advertisement and suppress its display on subsequent page loads.

requirements.title: Ad Re-enablement
requirements.description: The system shall allow the user to re-enable an ad that has been previously closed.

requirements.title: Random Typo Behavior
requirements.description: The system shall randomly include or exclude typos in the displayed text upon page load.

requirements.title: Add Element Action
requirements.description: The system shall add a new element to the page when the add element trigger is activated.

requirements.title: Remove Added Elements
requirements.description: The system shall allow the removal of dynamically added elements from the page.

requirements.title: Hover-to-Reveal Behavior
requirements.description: The system shall reveal hidden user details when the user hovers over an image.

requirements.title: Dynamic Content Refresh
requirements.description: The system shall load new text and images on each page refresh.

requirements.title: Numeric Input Handling
requirements.description: The system shall accept numeric entry in the designated input field.

requirements.title: Horizontal Slider Interaction
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to adjust a horizontal slider and reflect the updated value.

requirements.title: Custom Context Menu
requirements.description: The system shall provide a custom context menu triggered by a right-click action.

requirements.title: Exit Intent Detection
requirements.description: The system shall detect when the mouse leaves the viewport and display a modal window.

requirements.title: Password Retrieval
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to submit an email address to initiate a password retrieval process.

requirements.title: Geolocation Access
requirements.description: The system shall retrieve and display the user's current geographic coordinates.

requirements.title: JavaScript Dialog Handling
requirements.description: The system shall process browser-native dialogs including alerts, confirms, and prompts.

requirements.title: Infinite Scroll Content Loading
requirements.description: The system shall dynamically load content as the user scrolls down the page.

requirements.title: New Window Management
requirements.description: The system shall handle the opening of new browser windows.

acceptance_criteria.description: User shall be granted access upon providing valid credentials.
User shall be denied access upon providing invalid credentials.
User shall be able to select a file from the local system for upload.
System shall confirm successful receipt of the uploaded file.
User shall be able to initiate a download for available files.
System shall provide the requested file to the user's local system.
The page shall display a heading 'Welcome to the-internet' and a subheading 'Available Examples'.
The page shall present a vertical list of example names rendered as hyperlinks.
The page shall display a footer containing the text 'Powered by Elemental Selenium'.
The footer rendering must not interfere with the primary feature of the page.
The target checkbox shall toggle its checked state upon user interaction.
The checkbox shall maintain the state consistent with browser default behavior.
The system shall authenticate the user when 'tomsmith' and 'SuperSecretPassword!' are provided.
The system shall redirect the user to the secure area upon successful authentication.
System shall authenticate user with username 'tomsmith' and password 'SuperSecretPassword!'.
System shall navigate to the secure area page upon successful authentication.
System shall display an error message when invalid credentials are provided.
System shall prevent navigation to the secure area page upon failed authentication.
System shall update the visible selection to the chosen option.
System shall provide at least two selectable options.
System shall accept a file selected by the user.
System shall provide confirmation that the file has been uploaded.
A JavaScript alert dialog must be displayed when the trigger action is performed.
The system must allow the user to dismiss the alert dialog.
A JavaScript confirm dialog must be displayed upon the confirm trigger action.
A JavaScript prompt dialog must be displayed upon the prompt trigger action.
The page must include a visual region designated for drag-and-drop operations.
The drag-and-drop region must be accessible upon loading the page.
The system must display tables with columns: Last Name, First Name, Due, Web Site, and Action.
The system must populate the tables with the provided sample data rows.
Each table row must contain an edit control.
Each table row must contain a delete control.
A notification message must be visible above the page heading.
The notification message must convey an outcome status.
The system must update the notification message upon user request.
The system must not produce runtime errors when loading a new message.

acceptance_criteria.requirement_title: Entry Ad Display on First Load
acceptance_criteria.description: The advertisement must appear automatically when the page is loaded for the first time.

acceptance_criteria.requirement_title: Entry Ad Display on First Load
acceptance_criteria.description: The advertisement must be visually distinguishable from the background content.
The advertisement must be removed from the view when the close action is performed.
The advertisement must not reappear on subsequent page loads after being closed.
Ad shall be displayed on subsequent page loads after re-enabling.
Ad shall not be shown if it has not been re-enabled after closing.
Page shall display text with at least one typo on some page loads.
Page shall display text without typos on some page loads.
System shall add a new element to the DOM upon each activation.
System shall support multiple consecutive additions of elements.
Clicked element shall be removed from the DOM.
Removed element shall no longer be visible on the page.
User details shall be visible while the mouse pointer is over the image.
User details shall be hidden when the mouse pointer leaves the image area.
Content shall change upon page refresh.
Content shall remain static when the static content parameter is applied.
Field shall accept numeric characters.
Field shall support incrementing/decrementing values via browser controls.
Slider value must update when moved via mouse drag.
Slider value must update when moved via keyboard arrows.
Right-click must trigger the custom context menu.
Selecting the menu item must trigger a JavaScript alert.
Modal must appear when mouse exits the viewport.
Modal must include a functional close control.
Clicking a file link must initiate the browser download process.
The system must display a list of available files.
The system must accept an email address input.
The system must process the retrieval request upon submission.
The system must request access to user location.
The system must display latitude and longitude on the page.
System shall deny access when invalid credentials are provided.
System shall display an error message upon failed authentication.
System shall handle file upload requests without crashing the application.
System shall maintain stability when processing unsupported file formats.
System shall render result output after dialog interaction.
System shall remain functional after dialog dismissal or cancellation.
Slider shall respond to both mouse drag and keyboard arrow inputs.
Slider value shall clamp at the defined minimum and maximum limits.
System shall append new content sections upon reaching the scroll threshold.
System shall stop loading content when no further data is available.
System shall handle denied location permissions without crashing.
System shall display a message or empty state when location services are unavailable.
Base page shall remain functional if a new window fails to open due to blockers.
System shall successfully trigger the opening of a new window.

positive_scenarios.title: Successful Login
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is redirected to the secure area.

positive_scenarios.title: Successful Logout
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is logged out and redirected to the login page.

positive_scenarios.title: Upload Valid File
positive_scenarios.expected_result: System displays confirmation of file upload.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Uploaded Filename
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The uploaded filename is displayed on the result page.

positive_scenarios.title: Download Existing File
positive_scenarios.expected_result: File download initiates in the browser.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify File Integrity
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Downloaded file matches the expected file properties.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Home Page Content
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Page displays 'Welcome to the-internet' and 'Available Examples' with a list of links.

positive_scenarios.title: Navigate to Example Page
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is redirected to the corresponding example page.

positive_scenarios.title: Check Unchecked Box
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Checkbox becomes checked.

positive_scenarios.title: Uncheck Checked Box
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Checkbox becomes unchecked.

positive_scenarios.title: Login With Valid Credentials
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is granted access to the secure area.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Footer Presence
steps: Scroll to the bottom of the page
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Footer displays 'Powered by Elemental Selenium'.

positive_scenarios.title: No Error Message on Success
positive_scenarios.expected_result: No error message is displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Select Option 1
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Dropdown displays Option 1 as selected.

positive_scenarios.title: Select Option 2
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Dropdown displays Option 2 as selected.

positive_scenarios.title: Upload File via Selection
positive_scenarios.expected_result: System accepts file and displays confirmation.

positive_scenarios.title: Upload File via Drag and Drop
steps: Drag and drop file into area
positive_scenarios.expected_result: System accepts file and displays confirmation.

positive_scenarios.title: Trigger Alert Dialog
positive_scenarios.expected_result: A JavaScript alert dialog is displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Dismiss Alert Dialog
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The alert dialog closes and the result area updates.

positive_scenarios.title: Trigger Confirm Dialog
positive_scenarios.expected_result: A JavaScript confirm dialog is displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Trigger Prompt Dialog
positive_scenarios.expected_result: A JavaScript prompt dialog is displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Drag and Drop Region
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The drag-and-drop region is rendered on the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Drag and Drop Content
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The page displays the drag-and-drop powered content.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Table Columns
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Tables display the correct headers: Last Name, First Name, Due, Web Site, Action.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Table Data
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Tables contain the expected sample data rows.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Edit Action Presence
positive_scenarios.expected_result: An edit control is present in every table row.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Delete Action Presence
positive_scenarios.expected_result: A delete control is present in every table row.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Initial Notification
positive_scenarios.expected_result: A notification message is displayed above the heading.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Notification Content
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The message displays a valid outcome status.

positive_scenarios.title: Trigger New Message
steps: Click the load new message link
positive_scenarios.expected_result: A new notification message is displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Multiple Message Loads
steps: Click the load new message link multiple times
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The system displays new messages without errors.

positive_scenarios.requirement_title: Entry Ad Display on First Load
positive_scenarios.title: Verify Ad Appearance
positive_scenarios.expected_result: An advertisement modal is displayed.

positive_scenarios.requirement_title: Entry Ad Display on First Load
positive_scenarios.title: Verify Ad Visibility
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The ad is clearly distinguishable from the background.

positive_scenarios.title: Close Advertisement
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The advertisement is dismissed.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Ad Suppression
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The advertisement does not appear on the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Re-enable Ad Successfully
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The ad is displayed on the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Ad Remains Hidden
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The ad is not displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Observe Typo Presence
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Text contains a typo.

positive_scenarios.title: Observe Typo Absence
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Text is rendered correctly without typos.

positive_scenarios.title: Add Single Element
positive_scenarios.expected_result: A new element appears on the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Add Multiple Elements
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Three new elements appear on the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Remove Single Added Element
steps: Click the remove control on the added element
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The element is removed from the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Remove Multiple Added Elements
positive_scenarios.expected_result: All added elements are removed.

positive_scenarios.title: Reveal Details on Hover
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User name and profile link are displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Hide Details on Mouse Out
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User details are hidden.

positive_scenarios.title: Refresh Dynamic Content
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Content changes.

positive_scenarios.title: Load Static Content
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Content remains static.

positive_scenarios.title: Enter Valid Number
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Value is accepted.

positive_scenarios.title: Increment Number
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Value increases.

positive_scenarios.title: Update Slider via Mouse
steps: Click and drag the slider handle
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Value indicator updates to reflect new position.

positive_scenarios.title: Update Slider via Keyboard
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Value indicator increases.

positive_scenarios.title: Trigger Context Menu
steps: Right-click in the designated box area
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Custom context menu is displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Select Context Menu Item
positive_scenarios.expected_result: JavaScript alert is triggered.

positive_scenarios.title: Trigger Modal on Exit
steps: Move mouse cursor outside the viewport
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Modal window is displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Close Modal
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Modal window is dismissed.

positive_scenarios.title: Download File
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Browser initiates file download.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify File List
positive_scenarios.expected_result: List of files is visible.

positive_scenarios.title: Submit Valid Email
positive_scenarios.expected_result: System processes the request.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Form Elements
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Email field and button are displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Retrieve Location
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Latitude and longitude are displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Button Presence
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Where am I button is visible.

positive_scenarios.title: Handle Alert Dialog
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Result output is rendered on the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Adjust Slider via Mouse
steps: Click and drag the slider handle to a new position
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Slider value updates to reflect the new position.

positive_scenarios.title: Load Additional Content
steps: Scroll to the bottom of the page
positive_scenarios.expected_result: New content sections are dynamically appended to the page.

negative_scenarios.title: Login With Invalid Credentials
negative_scenarios.expected_result: User remains on the login page with an error notification.

negative_scenarios.title: Upload Without Selecting File
steps: Click upload without selecting a file
negative_scenarios.expected_result: System indicates no file was selected.

negative_scenarios.title: Download Non-Existent File
steps: Attempt to access a non-existent file path
negative_scenarios.expected_result: System returns a 404 error.

negative_scenarios.title: Attempt Selection without Interaction
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Dropdown remains at default prompt.

negative_scenarios.title: Upload without File Selection
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Browser default behavior applies.

negative_scenarios.title: Trigger Alert Without Interaction
negative_scenarios.expected_result: No alert is displayed until the button is clicked.

negative_scenarios.title: Trigger Dialogs Without Interaction
negative_scenarios.expected_result: No dialogs are displayed until the respective buttons are clicked.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify Page Load Failure
steps: Attempt to load /drag_and_drop with invalid network
negative_scenarios.expected_result: The drag-and-drop region fails to render.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify Missing Data
negative_scenarios.expected_result: The system does not display tables if data is unavailable.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify Missing Actions
negative_scenarios.expected_result: The system does not render rows without action controls.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify Missing Message
negative_scenarios.expected_result: The system does not display a message if the service is unavailable.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify Error Handling on Load
negative_scenarios.expected_result: The system does not crash if the new message fails to load.

negative_scenarios.requirement_title: Entry Ad Display on First Load
negative_scenarios.title: Verify Ad Not Displayed
negative_scenarios.expected_result: The ad does not display if the ad service is disabled.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify Ad Reappearance
negative_scenarios.expected_result: The ad reappears as the suppression state is lost.

negative_scenarios.title: Attempt Re-enablement Without Closing
negative_scenarios.expected_result: No change in ad state.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify Non-Typo Text Integrity
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Non-typo text remains unchanged.

negative_scenarios.title: Add Element Without Interaction
negative_scenarios.expected_result: No elements are added automatically.

negative_scenarios.title: Remove Non-Existent Element
steps: Attempt to remove element when none exist
negative_scenarios.expected_result: No action taken.

negative_scenarios.title: Hover Outside Image Area
steps: Hover near image but not over it
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Details remain hidden.

negative_scenarios.title: Invalid Content Parameter
negative_scenarios.expected_result: System defaults to dynamic behavior.

negative_scenarios.title: Enter Non-Numeric Character
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Input is rejected or ignored.

negative_scenarios.title: Invalid Slider Interaction
steps: Attempt to drag slider outside of bounds
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Slider remains at maximum or minimum boundary.

negative_scenarios.title: Click Outside Box
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Custom context menu is not displayed.

negative_scenarios.title: Mouse Movement Inside Viewport
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Modal window is not displayed.

negative_scenarios.title: Click Non-existent File
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Download does not initiate.

negative_scenarios.title: Submit Empty Form
negative_scenarios.expected_result: System does not process request.

negative_scenarios.title: Deny Location Access
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Coordinates are not displayed.

negative_scenarios.title: Submit Without File
steps: Click submit without selecting a file
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Application does not crash and handles the empty submission.

negative_scenarios.title: Cancel Confirm Dialog
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Result output renders correctly without script errors.

negative_scenarios.title: Deny Location Permission
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Page handles the denial gracefully without crashing.

boundary_scenarios.title: Upload Empty File
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: System handles the empty file upload gracefully.

boundary_scenarios.title: Rapid Toggle Interaction
steps: Click the checkbox multiple times in rapid succession
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: Checkbox state correctly reflects the final click action.

boundary_scenarios.title: Verify Default Prompt
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: Dropdown displays 'Please select an option' as the initial state.

boundary_scenarios.title: Verify Table With Minimum Rows
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: The table renders correctly with the minimum required rows.

boundary_scenarios.title: Verify Rapid Message Loading
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: The system handles rapid requests without runtime errors.

boundary_scenarios.title: Slider Maximum Value
steps: Drag slider to the far right

boundary_scenarios.title: Maximum Email Length
steps: Enter email with maximum character limit

boundary_scenarios.title: Login With Empty Fields
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: System treats input as incorrect and displays error message.

boundary_scenarios.title: Upload Large File
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: Application remains stable and does not crash.

boundary_scenarios.title: Exceed Slider Extremes
steps: Attempt to move slider beyond the maximum limit
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: Slider value remains clamped at the maximum limit.
